大小单双斩长龙.【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-239000253_63371897<br>vk.com/topic-238948532_63769332<br>vk.com/topic-239000239_63952503<br>vk.com/topic-238932578_63678652<br>vk.com/topic-239000256_63507752<br>vk.com/topic-238980296_63507758<br>vk.com/topic-239000301_64826635<br>vk.com/topic-238976012_63769455<br>vk.com/topic-239000248_63678525<br>vk.com/topic-238981695_63070803<br>vk.com/topic-239000263_63371920<br>vk.com/topic-239000237_64611449<br>vk.com/topic-239000238_63678537<br>vk.com/topic-238902708_63678658<br>vk.com/topic-238916119_63952567<br>vk.com/topic-239000264_63156092<br>vk.com/topic-238951215_63070818<br>vk.com/topic-239000303_63371925<br>vk.com/topic-238973487_64611575<br>vk.com/topic-238945029_63952667<br>vk.com/topic-239000234_63156100<br>vk.com/topic-238940157_64611582<br>vk.com/topic-238994624_63156115<br>vk.com/topic-238831059_63952600<br>vk.com/topic-239000246_63507794<br>vk.com/topic-239000270_64254523<br>vk.com/topic-239000265_63070827<br>vk.com/topic-238932578_63678716<br>vk.com/topic-238973487_64611600<br>vk.com/topic-238940157_64611607<br>vk.com/topic-239000259_63952612<br>vk.com/topic-239000306_63507826<br>vk.com/topic-239000241_64826702<br>vk.com/topi
